title: The Tea Party Falls Apart
description: On pages 16–16, this part focuses on Unknown person #12, Chiffon, Bege, Big Mom as The tea party collapses into chaos as the alliance tries to flee Big Mom’s territory.
scene: The assassination plan fails and the wedding becomes a desperate escape from a collapsing battlefield.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The yonkou really are on a different level, aren't they...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Now isn't the time for calm chit-chat, damn it! Haven't you figured that out?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This castle is literally me! It's pretty cute sturdy, but it isn't impreg- noble!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If this castle gets destroyed, I die. And if that happens, the castle disappears, you all get tossed outside as monster chow!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And if we don't get moving, hell will come for us!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Get it? Understand our utter despair yet?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hey, it's not my fault, okay, bege?! Those launchers are the most cutting-edge you'll find anywhere in this world, and...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Oh, yes, Bege! What the hell happened all of a sudden?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Every last one of you, get out hereee Eeeeee!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Show your- selves, you bas- tards!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: you... Did you try to betray me,

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island Escape storyline with 23 dialogue beats. The alliance survives the failed tea party by turning the chaos into a retreat.
